title: Way of the Word
story: Sensei: "The wise cursor moves by words, not steps. w leaps forward, b leaps back."

challenges.intro: Reach the temple in as few strides as you can.
buffer: the path to the temple is long
challenges.hint: w jumps to the start of the next word.

challenges.intro: Wisdom lies behind you. Leap back to it.
challenges.hint: b jumps to the start of the previous word.
